title: hieracium oligophyllum
intro: Hieracium oligophyllum, also known as small hawkweed or dwarf hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that grows in alpine and subalpine regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve liver and gallbladder issues, and treat fever and rheumatism. The health benefits of Hieracium oligophyllum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce oxidative stress and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
